githubActions.detail: GITHUB_TOKEN or GH_TOKEN is missing; GitHub Actions direct collection skipped.

ga4.detail: Read GA4 collector status for 98 sites.

findings.sourceLine: direct:dashboard site=discparty kind=other status=collection_timeout error=stats:update site collection failed: site discparty timed out after 90s
findings.title: 디스크파티 - GA4: OTHER direct collector signal collection_timeout
findings.recommendedAction: Inspect the timed-out site collection phase and its content endpoint before retrying collection; do not treat service-specific telemetry as a confirmed site defect.
